mapper.insert: insert into auth_refresh_tokens (session_id, user_id, refresh_token, expires_at, revoked, user_agent, last_used_at, created_at, updated_at) values (#{sessionId}, #{userId}, #{refreshToken}, #{expiresAt}, #{revoked}, #{userAgent}, #{lastUsedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: update auth_refresh_tokens set user_id = #{userId}, refresh_token = #{refreshToken}, expires_at = #{expiresAt}, revoked = #{revoked}, user_agent = #{userAgent}, last_used_at = #{lastUsedAt}, created_at = #{createdAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where session_id = #{sessionId}
